blockingIssues.description: `af setup [path]` contract is not implemented: `setup()` always persists `process.cwd()` and ignores provided path arguments, leaving VAL-CORE-010A unmet.
Integration coverage for setup stability omits explicit `af setup [path]` behavior and therefore misses the compatibility regression required by VAL-CORE-010A.

Legacy residual heuristic treats any untracked config with rulesync schema + `delete:false` as CLI-generated, which can auto-delete valid native `rulesync.jsonc` files and bypass intended native-project protection.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: For assertion-driven features, require at least one direct test/execution for every explicit CLI argument contract in validation items (example: when contract says `af setup [path]`, include a test invoking `setup` with a path argument).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature `cli-core-readonly-and-setup-stability` passed read-only checks but missed explicit path-argument behavior required by VAL-CORE-010A.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that strict tests-first can be adapted for validation-only or UI/prompt migration work, but workers must document rationale and still add/adjust deterministic coverage before completion.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple reviews reported procedural friction around mandatory red-first sequencing for prompt migration and test-stabilization features.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: If a required validator command is unavailable in repo scripts (for example `test:integration:real`), require explicit handling guidance in the skill (fallback command or mandatory omission rationale) to avoid inconsistent handoffs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Several independent reviews and handoffs reported mismatch between required `test:integration:real` and actual package scripts.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify acceptable evidence types for prompt UX assertions (interactive transcript evidence vs code-inspection plus automated tests) so review outcomes are consistent.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Prompt-routing validations repeatedly relied on source-inspection tests while contract wording emphasizes terminal-session records.

rejectedObservations.observation: Update .factory/services.yaml command map to fix integration-real mismatch
rejectedObservations.reason: requires overwriting an existing command entry rather than additive change; deferred to orchestrator guidance decision

rejectedObservations.observation: Add multiple duplicate notes about missing `test:integration:real` across all review reports
Add multiple duplicate notes about tests-first procedure rigidity
Document tuistory/node-pty setup in shared library immediately
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous mission requirement; useful but not required to determine cli-core pass/fail
